# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup. Define queue with message retention and visibility timeout. Set up SNS topic for pub/sub messaging. Configure queue policy to allow message operations. This is for our serverless event processing architecture.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent sqs policy too permissive.
# Category: sqs_policy_too_permissive

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Parameters:
  QueueName:
    Type: String
    Description: Name of the SQS queue
  TopicName:
    Type: String
    Description: Name of the SNS topic
  MessageRetentionSeconds:
    Type: Number
    Default: 1209600
    Description: Message retention in seconds (14 days)
  VisibilityTimeoutSeconds:
    Type: Number
    Default: 300
    Description: Visibility timeout in seconds (5 minutes)

Resources:
  EventProcessingQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Ref QueueName
      MessageRetentionPeriod: !Ref MessageRetentionSeconds
      VisibilityTimeout: !Ref VisibilityTimeoutSeconds
      RedrivePolicy:
        deadLetterTargetArn: !GetAtt DeadLetterQueue.Arn
        maxReceiveCount: 3
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref QueueName

  DeadLetterQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub "${QueueName}-dlq"
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${QueueName}-dlq"

  EventProcessingTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Ref TopicName
      Subscription:
        - Protocol: sqs
          Endpoint: !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.Arn

  QueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref EventProcessingQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowSendMessages
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: "*"
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                aws:SourceArn: !GetAtt EventProcessingTopic.Arn
          - Sid: AllowReceiveMessages
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: "*"
            Action:
              - sqs:ReceiveMessage
              - sqs:DeleteMessage
              - sqs:GetQueueAttributes
              - sqs:ChangeMessageVisibility
            Resource: !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                aws:SourceArn: !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.Arn
          - Sid: AllowSNSPublish
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: "*"
            Action:
              - sns:Publish
            Resource: !GetAtt EventProcessingTopic.Arn
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                aws:SourceArn: !GetAtt EventProcessingTopic.Arn

Outputs:
  QueueUrl:
    Description: URL of the SQS queue
    Value: !QueueUrl EventProcessingQueue

  QueueArn:
    Description: ARN of the SQS queue
    Value: !GetAtt EventProcessingQueue.Arn

  TopicArn:
    Description: ARN of the SNS topic
    Value: !GetAtt EventProcessingTopic.Arn
